c.d: Number and diversity of collage templates and layouts available for creating collages
Range of photo editing tools such as filters, text addition, background removal, and AI-enhanced editing
User interface intuitiveness and ease of creating collages, including automatic template suggestions
Supported operating systems and devices such as iOS, Android, Windows, and Web
Cost structure including free usage, subscription fees, free trials, and in-app purchases
Use of AI for background removal, template generation, image enhancement, and advanced editing
Ability to share collages via social media, email, SMS, or direct printing
